messages.content: Due to excellent BBB penetration, complete rescue effects were observed in mouse disease models with 10-fold less doses of FB-101 and FB418 compared to competitors.

This means that the BBB (blood-brain barrier) penetration of FB-101 and FB418 was very effective. In mouse disease models, the drugs were able to fully rescue or alleviate the disease symptoms with much lower doses compared to other competing drugs.

This suggests that FB-101 and FB418 have a strong ability to cross the blood-brain barrier and reach the target site in the brain. As a result, they can have a more potent therapeutic effect at lower doses, making them potentially more efficient and cost-effective compared to competing drugs.

Due to excellent BBB penetration, complete rescue effects were observed in mouse disease models with 10-fold less doses of FB-101 and FB418 compared to competitors.
is it right?

Yes, that statement is correct. The excellent BBB penetration of FB-101 and FB418 allowed for complete rescue effects in mouse disease models with doses that were 10 times lower than those required for competing drugs.

Because the predicted human effective doses of A and B are dozens of times less than the clinical doses of competitors (100 – 300 mg), high degrees of medication compliance can be expected from elderly subjects.   Please change this sentence more fluently

Due to the significantly lower predicted effective doses of drugs A and B in humans compared to the clinical doses of competing drugs (typically 100 – 300 mg), it is expected that elderly subjects will have a high level of medication compliance.

"다양한 퇴행성 뇌질환에 적용 가능한 질환조절가능한 First-in-Class 치료제" 영어로 번역해줘
"A disease-modifying First-in-Class therapeutic agent applicable to various neurodegenerative brain disorders."
“다양한 퇴행성 뇌질환으로 적응증 확장이 가능한 질환조절가능한 First-in-Class 치료제” 영어로 번역해줘
"A disease-modifying First-in-Class therapeutic agent with potential for indication expansion to various neurodegenerative brain disorders."
"Y-메이즈에서 평가된 B 대비 3배 낮은 용량부터 A에 의한 기억/행동결손으로부터의 완전한 보호 " 영어로 번역해줘
"Complete protection from memory/behavioral impairments by A, starting from doses 3 times lower than B, as evaluated in the Y-maze."
PET tracer 개발을 동시 진행하여 환자 선별에 접목, 임상 2상 성공 가능성 극대화 전략 보유, 영어로 번역해줘
"Simultaneous development of a PET tracer for patient selection, possessing a strategy to maximize the likelihood of successful Phase 2 clinical trials."
